overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through an affluent residential neighborhood. The character moves from a plaza with a historic brick building, along palm-lined sidewalks with passing traffic, across a street, and toward a large modern apartment complex on a sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with historic brick building and central fountain

agents.ego_description: walking through the courtyard plaza past scattered pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in red shirt standing near the fountain

entered.detail: large historic building with arched windows and red brick facade
well-maintained green grass area with decorative plants

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open courtyard plaza featuring a historic brick building with arched windows in the background. A circular fountain sits to the right while manicured lawns and scattered pedestrians fill the space. The ground consists of patterned brick paving.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined residential street with hedge walls

events.description: exits the courtyard plaza onto the sidewalk along the residential street
blue sports car drives past on the street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to moving traffic

notable_agents.action: pink sports car driving along the street
blue sports car passing by on the road

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the sidewalk
tall green hedge wall separating sidewalk from private properties

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the plaza onto a concrete sidewalk lined with tall palm trees on the left and hedge walls on the right. Various vehicles including a pink sports car and blue car pass by on the street. The scene features classic street lamps and residential properties hidden behind the hedges.

events.description: crossing the residential street to the opposite sidewalk
large pink apartment building comes into view ahead

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and continuing along the opposite sidewalk toward the large building

entered.detail: multi-story pink residential building with many windows and balconies

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the asphalt street to the opposite sidewalk, bringing a large pink apartment building into view in the distance. Palm trees now line the immediate left side of the path, and a jacaranda tree with purple flowers appears. The hedge wall from the previous section is left behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching intersection with large residential complex

events.description: approaching the intersection with traffic light visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward the intersection with the large apartment building now dominating the left side

entered.detail: traffic signal pole at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a street intersection with the large pink apartment building now dominating the left side of the frame. A traffic light and crosswalk become visible ahead as the sidewalk continues toward the intersection. The palm trees remain on the left while the scene opens up to the wider street junction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an affluent residential neighborhood that transitions from a historic plaza into a modern urban intersection. It begins in an open courtyard with patterned brick paving, moving past a circular fountain and a historic brick building with arched windows. As the character leaves the plaza, the scene shifts to a concrete sidewalk lined with tall palm trees and hedge walls while colorful sports cars pass by on the adjacent street. The camera then follows the character across the asphalt road, leaving the hedges behind as a purple-flowered jacaranda tree appears and a large pink apartment building emerges in the distance. Finally, the view opens up toward a wide street junction, with the massive pink complex dominating the left side of the frame as the character approaches a traffic light and crosswalk.
